buildCommand: bunx prisma generate --schema=../../packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma && bun run build
_crons_note: Vercel Hobby allows max 2 crons. retry-identity-provision (every 5min) + refresh-markup-medians (weekly) are commented out below; route them via GitHub Actions or Trigger.dev until upgrading to Pro. Endpoints still exist + accept POST with CRON_SECRET so manual + Actions invocation works.
